metadata.title: Install ION 3000
metadata.description:
Install the ION 3000 with an existing router or by replacing
the existing router. Weigh your options and then decide how you
want to install the ION 3000.

metadata.title: ION 3000
metadata.description:
The ION 3000 device is designed for the enterprise branch
that enables you to combine heterogeneous underlying transports
into a unified hybrid WAN.

metadata.title: Firewalls & Appliances
metadata.description: Palo Alto Networks® next-generation firewalls detect known and unknown threats, including in encrypted traffic, using intelligence generated across many thousands of customer deployments. That means they reduce risks and prevent a broad range of attacks. For example, they enable users to access data and applications based on business requirements as well as stop credential theft and an attacker’s ability to use stolen credentials.

the physical requirements and the kit component of the device.

metadata.title: ION 9000
metadata.description:
The Prisma SD-WAN ION 9000 creates a secure SD-WAN fabric
across data centers and branches.

availability (HA) environment between branch sites and data centers.

metadata.title: Before You Begin
metadata.description:
Learn how to check if your new appliance was tampered
with during shipping, learn about third-party component support,
and read the product safety warnings before installing the appliance.

metadata.title: Before You Begin
metadata.description:
Learn how to check if your new appliance was tampered
with during shipping, learn about third-party component support,
and read the product safety warnings before installing the appliance.
